Kimberly-Clark's third quarter earnings per share beat expectations at $1.83, but revenues fell short at $4.952 billion. Stock price declined due to retail inventory pressures.
news.summary: Kimberly-Clark Corporation (NYSE:KMB) saw a decrease in its stock price on Tuesday following its third quarter financial report. The company posted adjusted earnings per share of $1.83, surpassing expectations of $1.70. However, quarterly revenues of $4.952 billion fell short of the anticipated $5.048 billion. Sales for the quarter declined by 4%, but organic sales experienced a 1% growth compared to the previous year. Kimberly-Clark's adjusted gross margin for the quarter reached 36.7%, an increase of 90 basis points from the prior year, driven by significant productivity improvements. While Developed Markets like Australia, South Korea, and Western/Central Europe showed positive volume and mix trends, North America experienced a decline. Volumes in Developing and Emerging markets remained consistent with the previous year.

news.headline: Pentair beats Q3 estimates with $993M net sales, $239M adjusted operating income, and a 39.6% gross margin.
news.summary: Pentair plc's (NYSE:PNR) third-quarter 2024 net sales reached $993 million, showing a 2% decrease from the previous year but surpassing the estimated $988.8 million. Core sales, excluding external factors, dropped by 1% during this period. The gross margin saw a significant increase from 36.9% to 39.6% year-over-year, while adjusted operating income rose by 13% to $239 million, with the margin expanding by 310 basis points to 24.1%.Flow sales declined by 7% to $372.2 million, with segment income rising by 7% to $82.8 million and the operating margin reaching 22.2%, marking a 280 basis points increase year-over-year. Water Solutions sales dipped by 3% to $289.5 million, with segment income falling by 6% to $64.4 million and ROS decreasing to 22.2%, down by 80 basis points.Pool segment sales amounted to $331.4 million. These figures reflect Pentair's performance in the third quarter of 2024.

news.headline: ECB's Centeno: The data will tell us if we have to do 25 bps or 50 bps.
ECB's Centeno: Rates will converge rather quickly at the neutral rate.
Taiwan Data Center Colocation Market valued at USD 134M in 2023, expected to hit USD 235M by 2029 with CAGR of 9.81%. Standout providers: Chunghwa Telecom, Chief Telecom.
news.summary: A report analyzing the Taiwan Data Center Colocation Market has been recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com. In 2023, the market was valued at USD 134 million and is projected to reach USD 235 million by 2029, indicating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 9.81%. The report delves into retail and wholesale colocation pricing, highlighting trends, opportunities, growth barriers, and future prospects within the Taiwan data center colocation sector.

news.headline: Kinetic Business launches fiber & voice services for SMBs, schools, and libraries in Little Rock, providing enterprise-grade internet & communication solutions at affordable rates.
news.summary: In Little Rock, Arkansas, Kinetic Business, a prominent fiber internet provider under the Windstream brand, unveiled a fresh selection of internet, phone, and collaboration solution packages designed for small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs). These bundles cater to the requirements of SMBs seeking enterprise-grade internet and unified communications services that are simplified and cost-effective. The offerings provide SMBs with advanced digital communication features previously reserved for larger enterprises, enabling them to enhance their connectivity.

news.headline: IMF's Gourinchas: China stimulus measures announced by PBOC are not sufficient to lift growth in a substantially material way.
Peloton partners with Costco to sell Bike+ at 300 US stores and online, exclusive bundle available until 2025.
news.summary: In New York, Peloton Interactive, Inc. (NASDAQ: PTON) and Costco (NASDAQ: COST) revealed a collaboration where Costco plans to offer the Peloton Bike+ at 300 US locations and online at Costco.com for this holiday period. From November 1, exclusive Bike+ bundles will be available to Costco members until February 15, 2025, or until stocks run out. This marks Peloton's debut seasonal retail venture in the US, aligning with a company focused on providing a unique fitness experience.

news.headline: NetVRk launches AI-powered metaverse, integrates AI in interactions with NPCs. Also includes blockchain functionality.
news.summary: NetVRk, a metaverse platform, introduced its AI-powered alpha version, combining advanced language models and emotional intelligence for user engagement with NPCs in virtual environments. The platform aims to enhance user experience with dynamic AI interactions. Additionally, the alpha version involves blockchain features, allowing players to earn rewards through customizable AI companions tradable as NFTs. NetVRk's focus lies in blending AI and GameFi for an interactive metaverse experience. For further details, please refer to the complete article on Benzinga's platform.

Mozambique construction market is set to grow by 3.9% in 2024 and 4.8% annually from 2025 to 2028, driven by energy, transport infrastructure investments.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report on the construction market in Mozambique has been released, now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. The sector is anticipated to see a 3.9% growth in real terms in 2024. Furthermore, from 2025 to 2028, there is projected to be an average annual growth rate of 4.8% in real terms. This anticipated growth is attributed to investments in various areas such as energy, transport, commercial, industrial, infrastructure, utilities, and residential sectors within Mozambique.

news.headline: Udemy introduces AI capabilities to enhance learning programs, including AI Assistant and Skills Mapping, on its platform.
news.summary: A well-known online skills marketplace and learning platform, Udemy (Nasdaq: UDMY), based in San Francisco, has introduced a set of AI tools to assist organizations in developing customized and scalable learning initiatives. The newly unveiled Udemy AI Assistant, along with Skills Mapping and AI-driven learning paths, are key elements of the Intelligent Skills Platform. These features aim to offer a comprehensive AI-powered learning system, streamlining skills enhancement processes for organizations. This update is set to revolutionize the learning landscape, making skills development more efficient and quicker on a larger scale.

news.headline: ASML CEO emphasizes need for migration to succeed, stressing its continuity.
Bitcoin price drops below $67,000. Analyst suggests watching key support levels for potential scenarios in the coming week.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency analyst CryptoCred shared a comprehensive trading strategy for Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) in a recent podcast. Following a bullish weekly close, he outlined three possible scenarios for Bitcoin's price movement in the upcoming week: a strong upward trend, a temporary decline preceding additional growth, or a bearish reversal. This analysis by CryptoCred provides valuable insights for traders interested in BTC and ETH. For further details, the complete article can be found on a finance news website.

news.headline: ECB's Knot: Falling interest rates should ease debt burdens.
After $235M heist, Liminal disputes WazirX’s allegations. 75 days post-hack, WazirX holds $175M, shifting blame to custodian.
news.summary: After 75 days since the hack, WazirX was reported to still possess over $175 million despite accusing the custodian for the breach.

news.headline: Blockchain can combat AI fraud in crypto airdrops and elections as AI advances blur lines between humans and machines.
news.summary: The advancement of artificial intelligence (AI) technology has made it increasingly difficult to differentiate between humans and machines in the near future.

news.headline: 94% of Bitcoin in profit suggests $69K was a peak. Price dip caused by profit-taking & resistance. Breaking could lead to $1.6B short liquidations.
news.summary: The price of Bitcoin faced resistance and was rejected near $69,000 due to profit-taking. Breaking this resistance level could lead to over $1.6 billion in short liquidations.

news.headline: ECB's Knot: The financial system held up in the face of aggressive central bank rate rises.
ECB's Centeno: We need gradual, steady, and predictable reduction in interest rates to their neutral level.
Global food additives market reached $77.2 billion in 2023, expected to hit $106.8 billion by 2029, with 5.8% CAGR. North America led in 2023, set to grow at 5.5% through 2029.
news.summary: A recent report on the global food additives market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. By 2023, the market had achieved a value of $77.2 billion and is forecasted to exhibit a 5.8% compound annual growth rate (CAGR) from 2024 to 2029, ultimately reaching $106.8 billion by the end of 2029. North America was at the forefront of the market in 2023, attributed to the increasing demand for processed food items. The region is expected to continue its growth trajectory, with a projected CAGR of 5.5% through 2029.

news.headline: ECB's Centeno: There are signs that resilience of the labour market is waning.
Treasure Global Inc partners with Octagram Investment Limited to integrate mini-games into ZCity platform for user engagement.
news.summary: In a recent press release dated October 22, 2024, Treasure Global Inc (NASDAQ: TGL), a prominent e-commerce platform operator via the ZCity app, disclosed a crucial partnership deal with Octagram Investment Limited (“OCTA”), a software development company known for scalable solutions across different industries. The aim of this strategic partnership is to boost user involvement and fuel expansion by incorporating inventive mini-game features into the ZCity platform. The integration of these technology modules, such as interactive mini-games, is intended to drive growth and improve user engagement on the ZCity platform.

news.headline: Urban Air Adventure Park is expanding to University Heights, OH, bringing family entertainment to the area.
news.summary: An agreement has been reached for Urban Air Adventure Park to establish a new family entertainment center in University Heights, Ohio. The deal was signed on October 22, 2024. Urban Air Adventure Park, known as the leading indoor adventure park operator globally, is set to bring their next-level entertainment offerings to the area. This development marks a significant expansion plan for the company as they continue to grow their platform.

news.headline: The Fletcher School at Tufts University unveils STEM-designated International Development Economics track in MALD program.
news.summary: A new STEM-designated track in International and Development Economics (IDE) has been introduced at The Fletcher School, the graduate school of global affairs at Tufts University in Medford, Massachusetts. This track is part of the Master of Arts in Law and Diplomacy (MALD) program and combines quantitative economics and econometrics to tackle global development challenges. Known as MALD: IDE, this program equips students with advanced tools to address crucial economic issues effectively. This addition provides a comprehensive approach to understanding and solving economic problems within global development.

news.headline: LeadsOnline introduces IBIS ClearCase to streamline crime gun investigations with automated cartridge case triage.
news.summary: A new ballistic analysis tool, IBIS ClearCase, has been launched by LeadsOnline, a prominent provider of data and technology for law enforcement agencies. The tool is designed to expedite the examination of cartridge casings obtained from crime scenes. IBIS ClearCase is fully automated and can swiftly capture exhibit images and location data at the crime scene. Its capabilities include determining the quantity and caliber of firearms involved in the incident and identifying the most suitable casings for further investigation. This innovative tool aims to enhance efficiency in forensic analysis.

news.headline: NaphCare and Middlesex County Office win NCCHC Pinnacle Award for top-notch correctional healthcare.
news.summary: A prestigious award has been granted to the Middlesex County Office of Adult Corrections and Youth Services in partnership with NaphCare, Inc. The National Commission on Correctional Health Care (NCCHC) honored them with the esteemed Pinnacle Award, recognizing their commitment to providing exceptional healthcare within correctional facilities. This distinction marks Middlesex County's dedication to delivering top-tier medical services. The achievement of the Pinnacle Award is a significant milestone, as it is only the second time it has been bestowed.

news.headline: Arizona's largest limited jurisdiction court in Phoenix adopts Tyler Technologies' Court Case Management Solution. Tyler signed an agreement with the court to use the Enterprise Justice solution.
news.summary: A recent development in Plano, Texas reveals that Tyler Technologies has secured a significant deal with the Phoenix Municipal Court. This agreement will see the court implementing Tyler’s Enterprise Justice solution. The specifics of the deal, including the financial figures and duration, were not disclosed in the announcement. Tyler Technologies, known for its innovative tech solutions, is set to play a pivotal role in enhancing operational efficiency and service delivery for the Phoenix Municipal Court through this partnership.

ECB's Centeno: Undershooting Euro zone inflation target is the new risk, which could stifle growth.
Damon Rein appointed as Head of Investor Relations at Township Capital, bringing 30+ years of experience in alternative investments.
news.summary: In October 22, 2024, Township Capital of Palm Beach, Florida, revealed the selection of Damon Rein as the new Head of Investor Relations. Damon Rein boasts more than three decades of expertise in alternative investments, business development, and fundraising. His appointment is a key move for the firm as they aim to capitalize on his experience to enhance their investor relations strategies.

news.headline: Perspire Sauna Studio expands in South Florida with new 3-studio deal, growing in the Sunshine State.
news.summary: One of the top infrared and red-light sauna franchises in the country is experiencing significant expansion in Florida's Palm Beach County. Perspire Sauna Studio, the nation's leading sauna studio, revealed on October 22, 2024, that it will be introducing contrast therapy soon. This growth marks a key development for the franchise as it expands its presence in the Sunshine State.

news.headline: Hevo Data, a cloud-based data platform, now on Google Cloud Marketplace, simplifying data integration for users.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Hevo Data, a prominent cloud-based data integration platform, announced its availability on the Google Cloud Marketplace. This move aims to streamline how businesses utilize their Google Cloud data. By offering this integration, it enables Google Cloud customers to effortlessly access and utilize their data within the platform, enhancing their overall experience.

news.headline: Susan G. Komen announces ShareForCures Alliance to empower women in breast cancer research beyond awareness month.
news.summary: In Dallas, the Susan G. Komen® organization has introduced the ShareForCures (SFC) Alliance at the close of National Breast Cancer Awareness Month. The SFC Alliance aims to unite women in a collaborative effort to revolutionize breast cancer research. Recognizing the need for sustained assistance in combating breast cancer beyond awareness campaigns, this initiative brings together various nonprofit organizations. This innovative approach seeks to leverage the collective strength of women to shape the future of research in this field.

news.headline: Dr. Christina Seamster named head of schools for Holston Academy (grades 6-12) and PBIA SES in Boca Raton, FL.
news.summary: In Boca Raton, Florida, Dr. Christina Seamster, known for her expertise in personalized learning, has been named the head of schools for Stanza Education Corporation. The corporation oversees two schools: Holston Academy, an online private school catering to grades 6-12, and Palm Beach International Academy (PBIA SES), a hybrid microschool. PBIA SES is preparing to launch a new campus in Boca Raton soon. Holston Academy provides a close-knit virtual learning environment with academic guidance, mentorship, and challenging curriculum.

news.headline: 14th annual Spok survey in Plano, Texas reveals insights on healthcare communication
news.summary: The 14th Annual Spok Survey conducted in Plano, Texas, provides valuable insights into the changing landscape of healthcare communication. The survey delves into the challenges and opportunities faced by the industry.

news.headline: Genoa Ventures promotes Landon Merrill to Partner, bringing two decades of experience. Strengthening science-driven investments.
news.summary: In San Francisco, a venture capital firm called Genoa Ventures has recently promoted Landon Merrill from Principal to Partner. Merrill has been with Genoa since June 2021 and has over 20 years of experience in the life sciences industry. His expertise covers various sectors such as R&D tools, medical devices, automation, and pharma services. This promotion signifies Genoa's recognition of Merrill's valuable contributions and skills acquired throughout his career.

news.headline: Poland's construction industry to shrink by over 5% in 2024 due to high inflation, interest rates, and construction costs.
news.summary: A report on the Poland Construction Market has been released, forecasting a 5.7% decline in the industry in 2024. The report covers sectors such as Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional, and Residential markets. Factors contributing to this decline include high inflation, interest rates, and construction costs. The residential sector is particularly weak. The report provides insights and analysis for the period 2024-2028 and is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.headline: Kenya's construction industry to grow at 6% AAGR from 2025-2028. Output to expand by 5.5% this year with investments in transport, energy, housing, industrial facilities.
news.summary: Report from ResearchAndMarkets.com reveals that the construction market in Kenya is projected to grow by 5.5% in real terms this year. This growth is driven by investments in energy, infrastructure, and industrial sectors, as well as a resurgence in export activities. The report titled "Kenya Construction Market Size, Trends, and Forecasts by Sector - Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional and Residential Market Analysis, 2024-2028" offers insights into the market trends.

news.headline: Romania's construction industry output to shrink by 4.6% in 2024 due to high inflation, interest rates, and falling permits.
news.summary: A report on Romania's construction market has been released by ResearchAndMarkets.com, indicating that the industry is projected to decrease by 4.6% in real terms in 2024. This decline is attributed to factors such as high inflation, elevated interest rates, increasing construction expenses, and a drop in residential building permits. The report covers various sectors including commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential markets, providing insights and trends for the period 2024-2028.

news.headline: Czech Republic construction industry output to grow by 0.4% in 2024, facing effects of elevated inflation - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A report on the Czech Republic Construction Market indicates a projected growth rate of 0.4% in real terms for 2024. The industry is facing challenges due to increased inflation leading to higher material costs. The market analysis covers sectors including Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, as well as Institutional and Residential construction. The report, available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, offers insights and forecasts for the Czech Republic construction industry from 2024 to 2028.

news.headline: 3M Q3 earnings: $6.294B net sales, 0.4% increase YoY, $1.98 EPS, 18% increase YoY, raises FY24 profit outlook.
news.summary: 3M Company's (NYSE:MMM) stocks have surged after the company announced its third-quarter financial results, surpassing expectations. Net sales hit $6.294 billion, a slight 0.4% increase from last year. Adjusted net sales were up by 1.5% to $6.068 billion, slightly exceeding the projected $6.057 billion. Adjusted earnings per share stood at $1.98, marking an 18% increase year-over-year and surpassing the estimated $1.90. The adjusted organic sales growth for the quarter was 1.0%, with a minimal negative impact of (~1.0) ppt from portfolio/geographic prioritization. Adjusted operating margin also saw a 1.4% expansion. The company revised its FY24 EPS guidance, reflecting a positive outlook moving forward.

news.headline: Freeport-McMoRan's Q3 revenue was $6.79B, beating estimates of $6.47B. Copper sales were 1.0 billion pounds, down 7% Y/Y, with an average price of $4.30 per pound. Gold sales were 558K ounces, up 40% Y/Y, with an average price of $2,568 per ounce. Operating income was $1.938B vs $1.492B last year.
news.summary: Shares of Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (NYSE:FCX) saw an increase in trading following the company releasing its third-quarter FY24 results. Revenue exceeded expectations at $6.79 billion, surpassing the consensus of $6.47 billion. Copper sales were at 1.0 billion pounds, a 7% decrease year-over-year, yet 2% higher than the July 2024 estimate due to shipping timing and lower ore grades and operating rates in North America. The average realized price per pound of copper was $4.30, with total production reaching 1.051 billion pounds. Gold sales were 558 thousand ounces, showing a 40% increase from the previous year and 17% above the July 2024 estimate due to shipment timing, with an average realized price per ounce of $2,568. Operating income stood at $1.938 billion compared to $1.492 billion in the previous year. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: RTX beats Q3 expectations, raises 2024 outlook with adjusted net sales at $20.089 billion, EPS at $1.45 (+16% Y/Y).
news.summary: RTX Corporation (NYSE: RTX) saw a surge in shares following the release of its third-quarter fiscal 2024 results, surpassing street expectations. The company revised its 2024 outlook as adjusted net sales rose by 6% year-over-year to $20.089 billion, surpassing the estimated $19.848 billion. Adjusted EPS also experienced a 16% growth, reaching $1.45, exceeding the anticipated $1.34. Collins Aerospace reported sales of $7.075 billion, reflecting a 7% increase year-over-year. This growth was primarily attributed to a 14% rise in defense sales and a 9% increase in commercial aftermarket sales, although it was partially offset by an 8% decline in commercial OE sales. The adjusted operating margin for Collins Aerospace contracted by 10 bps year-over-year to 15.5%. Pratt & Whitney recorded sales of $7.239 billion, showcasing a 14% increase year-over-year. This was driven by a 13% surge in commercial aftermarket sales, 20% growth in military sales, and a 9% rise in commercial OE sales.

news.headline: Global renewable naphtha market set to reach USD 21.4 billion by 2031, growing at a CAGR of 41.9% driven by focus on circular economy and emerging applications beyond fuel blending. Key players include Neste, TotalEnergies, and UPM Biofuels.
news.summary: The global renewable naphtha market is projected to grow at a CAGR of 41.9% from 2023 to 2031, with estimated sales revenue reaching US$ 21.4 billion by 2031. This growth is attributed to the adoption of circular economy principles by companies, leading to increased focus on optimizing resource use and reducing waste generation. Advancements in biorefinery integration and process optimization have made renewable naphtha production more efficient and cost-effective. Emerging applications in bio-based plastics, resins, and specialty chemicals are driving market expansion. Key players dominating the market include Neste, TotalEnergies, and UPM Biofuels, with smaller players like Gevo and Avantium carving out niche markets through technological expertise. Regulatory support and consumer preference for eco-friendly solutions are further driving competition and growth in the sector.

news.headline: Fermented Food Holdings, Inc. appoints Jorge Azevedo as CEO amidst growth. Leading sauerkraut producer in North America.
news.summary: A major producer of sauerkraut in North America, Fermented Food Holdings, Inc. (FFH), has revealed new leadership on October 22, 2024, in Madison, Wisconsin. The company is recognized for its top-notch fermented, functional food products and is experiencing substantial growth.

news.headline: 5WPR, a top U.S. PR firm, named finalist in Ragan's PR Daily Awards 2024 for media strategy.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, 5WPR, a prominent PR firm in the United States, shared their support for The Lumistella Company, the firm behind The Elf on the Shelf® Santaverse™. The Lumistella Company serves as the official platform for sharing the tales of the beloved The Elf on the Shelf® brand. Known as one of the largest independently owned PR companies in the U.S., 5WPR highlighted their collaboration with The Lumistella Company in a recent announcement.
